allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('SSL mode:', d.get\('result',{}\).get\('value'\), '| success:', d.get\('success'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['name'],'|',r['phase'],'|',r['id']\) for r in d.get\('result',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:',d.get\('success'\),'| ruleset id:',d.get\('result',{}\).get\('id'\),'| errors:',d.get\('errors'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else d\); [print\(' ', k.get\('platform'\), '|', k.get\('status'\), '|', 'enabled='+str\(k.get\('enabled'\)\)\) for k in \(d if isinstance\(d,list\) else []\)]")
